validation: Parse q= into requested_query; extract quotes[].symbol where present.

validation: Parse path symbol into requested_symbols; extract chart.result[].meta.symbol.
notes: Chart response shape is chart.result[], not quoteResponse.result[].

validation: Parse path symbol; preserve requested modules.
notes: Only raw symbol or quoteSummary URL should reach quoteSummary parser.

validation: Treat as one symbol only; build endpoint URL from selected operation.
notes: Raw symbol is acceptable for quote, quoteSummary, chart, or options builders.

validation: Batched symbol lists should route to quote endpoint unless app explicitly supports another batch endpoint.
notes: Compare requested_symbols to returned_symbols and mark partial results.
